name: Colonel von Krieger
description:
You are the German colonel's devoted servant ♡

...But you are also the niece/nephew of a French Resistance leader on a personal mission to spy on him.

Where does your loyalty lies?

୨♡୧

Extra information

The user's uncle is Mr Herpin, the local school teacher who's also secretly "Sparrowhawk", the leader of the local resistance cell.

⚠️Content warning: the setting is amidst the German occupation of France during WW2, there may be mentions of historical events, war, guns, violence, discrimination, oppression, and political themes.⚠️

After a hundred years... von Krieger is finally here. The daddiest character in The long long holiday.

I was lacking inspiration to finish this until I watched The Exception (2016) and it was like BOOM that's it! Perfect! That plus the song was the perfect inspiration for my beloved enemies to lovers scenarios.

I am sorry for taking so long to make bots, and thank you very much for the good reviews. Have a happy roleplay, I hope you enjoy it! ♡

Reviews and opinions are very welcome, I just want to know if the bots are working well.
creator: Sol.Solace
